source: Dawid & Skene (1979), 'Maximum Likelihood Estimation of Observer Error-Rates Using the EM Algorithm', Table 1
notes: Observer 1 assessed each patient 3 times (columns 0-2). Observers 2-5 assessed once each (columns 3-6). Categories 1-4 represent anaesthesia fitness grades.
local_maximum_note: Patients 2 and 12 converge to a different local maximum than Table 4. The paper itself identifies patients 2, 12, 14, 38 as sensitive to starting values. Our majority-vote initialization (eq 3.1) matches the paper, but the EM path differs for these 2 patients. Cross-checked with independent Python implementation — same result. 43/45 labels match Table 4 exactly.
cross_check: Table 1 data verified against PDF by independent subagent. Table 2 marginal priors match. Table 4 argmax labels match for 43/45 patients; 2 sensitive-case differences documented above.
